items.title: Save the Date: 2nd Princeton CorpGov Forum May 21, 2026
items.description: CorpGov will host the second Princeton CorpGov Forum on Thursday, May 21, 2026, at The Nassau Inn in Princeton, New Jersey. The forum will feature an afternoon of panels, firesides and networking, followed by a networking reception with cocktails and heavy hors d’oeuvres. ​ The event will be digitized into a report published on CorpGov […] The post Save the Date: 2nd Princeton CorpGov Forum May 21, 2026 appeared first on CorpGov.

items.title: Kenvue's $48.7 Billion Sale Puts Consumer Staples ETFs Back In Vogue
items.description: The $48.7 billion Kimberly-Clark–Kenvue deal could reshape major consumer staples ETFs like XLP, VDC, and IYK.

items.title: Papa John's sinks 10% on report Apollo withdrew its offer to take chain private
items.description: Shares of pizza chain Papa John's sank 10% on Tuesday following a report that Apollo Global has withdrawn its offer to take the chain private.

items.title: Is Procter & Gamble's (PG) Strong Quarter Shifting Analyst Views on Its Long-Term Growth Story?
items.description: In the past week, Procter & Gamble reported strong first-quarter earnings results, maintained full-year guidance, and completed a US$1.25 billion and €1 billion bond offering to support operational flexibility and funding needs. The company’s continued share repurchases and cost-saving initiatives, alongside efficiency improvements, highlight its emphasis on returning value to shareholders and strengthening its balance sheet despite mixed global consumer demand. We'll assess how Procter &...
